name: Mushroom Strata
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Similar to a souffle, but really a lovely mushroom casserole. Our version of a quiche-good brunch item.
2. Serve with tiny muffins and fresh fruit.
3. Earlier in the day or the day before: Saute mushrooms, onions, celery, and green pepper in margarine until tender. Drain off excess liquid. Remove from heat and stir in yogurt and mayonnaise.
4. Lightly oil a 9-by-13 inch baking dish. Line the bottom with quartered bread (use half the slices; remove crusts if desired). Pour vegetable/yogurt mixture over bread.
5. Add remaining bread to form another layer. Mix egg substitute and skim milk, then pour over bread. Cover and refrigerate for at least one hour or overnight.
6. One Hour Before Serving: Preheat oven to 300°F. Stir together soup mix and skim milk. Spread over the casserole. Top with grated cheese and bake for 1 hour.
7. Garnish with parsley and paprika. Allow to set for a few minutes before cutting into squares. Serve warm. Makes 9 servings (about 3 by 4 inches).
